title: fix(deps): update module github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/v7 to v8 - autoclosed
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/v7](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu) | `v7.2.0` → `v8.2.0` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcheckpoint-restore%2fgo-criu%2fv7/v8.2.0?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcheckpoint-restore%2fgo-criu%2fv7/v7.2.0/v8.2.0?slim=true) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>checkpoint-restore/go-criu (github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/v7)</summary>

### [`v8.2.0`](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/releases/tag/v8.2.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/compare/v8.1.0...v8.2.0)

#### What's Changed

- readme: update release version by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [#​221](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/221)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.39.0 to 0.40.0 in the all group by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​222](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/222)
- Move contribution guidelines to CONTRIBUTING.md by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​227](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/227)
- dependabot: add github-actions and switch to weekly by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​226](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/226)
- ci: update different github action actions by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​225](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/225)
- build(deps): bump DavidAnson/markdownlint-cli2-action from 9 to 22 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​228](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/228)
- build(deps): bump actions/setup-go from 5 to 6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​230](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/230)
- build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 3 to 6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​232](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/232)
- build(deps): bump codecov/codecov-action from 4 to 5 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​231](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/231)
- Fix InheritFd by passing fds via cmd.ExtraFiles by [@​dfeigin-nv](https://redirect.github.com/dfeigin-nv) in [#​224](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/224)
- build(deps): bump github/codeql-action from 2 to 4 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​233](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/233)
- Update version in README.md to 8.2.0 by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​234](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/234)

#### New Contributors

- [@​dfeigin-nv](https://redirect.github.com/dfeigin-nv) made their first contribution in [#​224](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/224)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/compare/v8.1.0...v8.2.0>

### [`v8.1.0`](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/releases/tag/v8.1.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/compare/v8.0.0...v8.1.0)

#### What's Changed

- Run apt-get update before installing packages by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​219](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/219)
- build(deps): bump google.golang.org/protobuf from 1.36.10 to 1.36.11 in the all group by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​218](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/218)
- crit: Add support for TaskState decoding by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [#​220](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/220)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/compare/v8.0.0...v8.1.0>

### [`v8.0.0`](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/releases/tag/v8.0.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/compare/v7.2.0...v8.0.0)

#### What's Changed

- crit: update protobuf bindings by [@​snprajwal](https://redirect.github.com/snprajwal) in [#​198](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/198)
- add(crit): other os support by [@​cg10036](https://redirect.github.com/cg10036) in [#​197](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/197)
- chore: update dependencies by [@​snprajwal](https://redirect.github.com/snprajwal) in [#​201](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/201)
- crit: update protobuf bindings by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​207](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/207)
- build(deps): bump the all group with 2 updates by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​206](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/206)
- ci: bump actions, remove Go matrix by [@​snprajwal](https://redirect.github.com/snprajwal) in [#​208](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/208)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.31.0 to 0.32.0 in the all group by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​209](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/209)
- Invalidate global vars containing parsed images in Explore\* methods by [@​pbeschetnov](https://redirect.github.com/pbeschetnov) in [#​210](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/210)
- readme: update status badges by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [#​212](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/212)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.32.0 to 0.33.0 in the all group by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​211](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/211)
- Sync protobuf definitions with CRIU by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​216](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/216)
- Switch to go-criu v8 by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​217](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/217)
- build(deps): bump the all group across 1 directory with 3 updates by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​214](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/214)

The type of the required [`nr_pages`](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/blob/85eaa772833c6a7bd1f64d34ad733a4d6ac8d2ad/crit/images/pagemap.proto#L13) field in the `pagemap_entry` message has been changed from `uint32` to `uint64`. Backward compatibility is preserved by adding a new optional [`nr_pages`](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/blob/85eaa772833c6a7bd1f64d34ad733a4d6ac8d2ad/crit/images/pagemap.proto#L16) field with type `uint64` and renaming the old field to `compat_nr_pages` while preserving its protobuf field number.

#### New Contributors

- [@​cg10036](https://redirect.github.com/cg10036) made their first contribution in [#​197](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/197)
- [@​pbeschetnov](https://redirect.github.com/pbeschetnov) made their first contribution in [#​210](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/210)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/compare/v7.2.0...v8.0.0>

</details>
